# Generated by ollama (mistral)
# Prompt: Write Linkerd Server and ServerAuthorization resources for microservices. Define which services can communicate with each other. Configure port-based and service account-based authorization rules. This is for our zero-trust service mesh.
# Category: linkerd_authz_missing

apiVersion: linkerd.io/v2
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: microservice1
spec:
  k8sServiceAccount: microservice1-sa
  portMapping:
  - localPort: 80
    servicePort: 80
---
apiVersion: linkerd.io/v2
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: microservice2
spec:
  k8sServiceAccount: microservice2-sa
  portMapping:
  - localPort: 80
    servicePort: 80
---
apiVersion: linkerd.io/v2
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: zero-trust-policy
spec:
  policies:
  - fromServices:
    - microservice1
    toServices:
    - microservice2
  authorization: ALLOW
---
apiVersion: linkerd.io/v2
kind: ServiceAccountAuthorization
metadata:
  name: service-account-policy
spec:
  rules:
  - match:
      selector: serviceAccountName=microservice1-sa
    action: ALLOW
  - match:
      selector: serviceAccountName=microservice2-sa
    action: ALLOW
